positive: A whimsical, stylized portrait of a celestial forest gnome sitting cross-legged on a glowing mushroom cap. The gnome has deep emerald clothing, braided beard, and is surrounded by oversized bioluminescent flora, crystal clusters, and floating runes. Use a high-contrast, vibrant deep-fantasy aesthetic, inspired by stained glass and ink wash techniques, emphasizing clean, thick outlines and strong, jewel-toned color blocking. The composition must be symmetrical and centered, perfect for a repeating pattern tile. Lighting is ethereal, emanating from the flora and the gnome itself, creating deep shadow pockets and brilliant highlights. Rule of thirds placement for the main subject, with harmonious negative space for text or details. Mid-century modern fantasy style, highly detailed, print resolution, vector art quality.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, photographic, bokeh, photo-realistic, gradient wash
